title: Eleven Keys for the Glass Vault
description: In the city of Aldemar, magic is licensed, metered, and locked behind the Glass Vault — and only the Cartographers' Guild holds the keys. Sefa Iron-Quill has stolen exactly ten of them. The eleventh is fused to the wrist of the man who once left her to drown. A heist fantasy where every spell has a receipt and every favor has interest.
